sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49884" key="i)diosustasi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰδῐο-συστᾰσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n49884.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">peculiar constitution</tr_>, prob. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:56" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.56</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
